title: pinus abies f. obovata
intro: Pinus abies f. obovata, also known as Siberian fir, is a variant of the Siberian fir tree species (Pinus sibirica) characterized by its obovate needles. Traditionally, the plant is used in folk medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils such as alpha-pinene and beta-pinene. The health benefits of Pinus abies f. obovata include relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The plant is commonly prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, and its essential oils are also used in aromatherapy and perfumery.
